content: I'm working with a 2.5Gb dataset that is just too large for my computer memory (if I try to put it all in a DataFrame). I was wondering what people in the community use to deal with such scenarios. I mean, I'll use this dataset to do some visualizations, aggregations and prediction models. I've found DTable from Dagger.jl, but I'm wondering whether it's robust enough, since it kind of looks new.
